parameters.content:
### Feedback Email for the sales person with adequte feedback on corrections to make

In this feedback email sent to the salesperson, i add a  detailed explanation to why the form details needs to be corrected. I used an LLM to summarize the problems with the invalid form data.

parameters.subject: =Action Required: Review Proposal form details for {{ $('Add ID').item.json.FormId }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Add Timestamp').item.json.body["5. Salesperson Name"] }},

The form submission for was missing critical details. Here is the feedback from the AI system: "{{ $json.rejection_reason }}"  We need high-quality inputs to generate a client-ready document. Please review your notes and resubmit the discovery form with the requested details.  

Thanks, 
Sourcing Sprints Approver

nodes.name: Send a message to the salesperson to resubmit the form with corrections

parameters.content:
## Duplicate was handled in this airtable node below

I used the airtable node operation create or update, which provides a field to map a column used to match the incoming record. i use the formId column so it checks if a formId already existing
### Part 2 Form Input Validation and Cleaning

## Why an LLM node for validation?

I saw that some data form fields like "Project Scope" cannot be validated efficiently with just regex. And i wanted the salesperson to give adequate data so as to avoid hallucinations to happen in the upcoming LLM node that expands the input.

body.7. Summary of Client's Needs: Elevate Shop is manually copying order data from Shopify into their warehouse spreadsheet. They need an automated pipeline to sync inventory and generate shipping labels instantly.
body.8. Project Scope: Build an integration syncing Shopify webhooks to an Airtable inventory base, and connect it to ShipStation for automated label generation.
body.9. Goals & Objectives: Cut fulfillment errors to zero. Save the warehouse team 15 hours of manual data entry per week.
body.10. Recommended Services/Deliverables: Shopify Webhook Configuration, Airtable Inventory System Build, Make.com/n8n Mapping, and 1 week of testing.
